_comment: 3x/day (06:00/12:00/21:00 Brussels, src/triggers/ai_manager.py's _CALL_CHECKPOINT_HOURS) world-news recap. Each call decides a BATCH of 0 to max_posts_per_call posts -- a broad snapshot of the most important things since the last recap, not forced into a single post (2026-07-20: refined from an initial single-post-only version that lost real content on busy periods). Still no queue: every accepted post in a call's batch fires immediately in that same run, one after another -- nothing spreads across subsequent hourly runs, the 3 checkpoints are the only pacing. max_calls_per_day matches the 3 checkpoints so every one can actually fire. World news (config/world_news.json) is the primary input; crypto/finance/AI (config/keywords.json, prices, the CryptoScope Oracle) are secondary, folded in only when genuinely notable -- see ai_manager_brain.py's prompt.
